members.name: AddAnimation
members.signature: public void AddAnimation(StringName anim)
members.summary: Adds a new [param anim] animation to the library.

members.name: AddFrame
members.signature: public void AddFrame(StringName anim, Texture2D texture, float duration, int atPosition)
members.summary: Adds a frame to the [param anim] animation. If [param at_position] is [code]-1[/code], the frame will be added to the end of the animation. [param duration] specifies the relative duration, see [method get_frame_duration] for details.

members.name: Clear
members.signature: public void Clear(StringName anim)
members.summary: Removes all frames from the [param anim] animation.

members.name: ClearAll
members.signature: public void ClearAll()
members.summary: Removes all animations. An empty [code]default[/code] animation will be created.

members.name: DuplicateAnimation
members.signature: public void DuplicateAnimation(StringName animFrom, StringName animTo)
members.summary: Duplicates the animation [param anim_from] to a new animation named [param anim_to]. Fails if [param anim_to] already exists, or if [param anim_from] does not exist.

members.name: GetAnimationLoop
members.signature: public bool GetAnimationLoop(StringName anim)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [code]get_animation_loop_mode(anim) == LOOP_LINEAR[/code]. Otherwise, returns [code]false[/code].

members.name: GetAnimationLoopMode
members.signature: public int GetAnimationLoopMode(StringName anim)
members.summary: Returns the loop mode for the [param anim] animation.

members.name: GetAnimationNames
members.signature: public PackedStringArray GetAnimationNames()
members.summary: Returns an array containing the names associated to each animation. Values are placed in alphabetical order.

members.name: GetAnimationSpeed
members.signature: public float GetAnimationSpeed(StringName anim)
members.summary: Returns the speed in frames per second for the [param anim] animation.

members.name: GetFrameCount
members.signature: public int GetFrameCount(StringName anim)
members.summary: Returns the number of frames for the [param anim] animation.

members.name: GetFrameDuration
members.signature: public float GetFrameDuration(StringName anim, int idx)
members.summary: Returns a relative duration of the frame [param idx] in the [param anim] animation (defaults to [code]1.0[/code]). For example, a frame with a duration of [code]2.0[/code] is displayed twice as long as a frame with a duration of [code]1.0[/code]. You can calculate the absolute duration (in seconds) of a frame using the following formula: [codeblock] absolute_duration = relative_duration / (animation_fps * abs(playing_speed)) [/codeblock] In this example, [code]playing_speed[/code] refers to either [method AnimatedSprite2D.get_playing_speed] or [method AnimatedSprite3D.get_playing_speed].

members.name: GetFrameTexture
members.signature: public Texture2D GetFrameTexture(StringName anim, int idx)
members.summary: Returns the texture of the frame [param idx] in the [param anim] animation.

members.name: HasAnimation
members.signature: public bool HasAnimation(StringName anim)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the [param anim] animation exists.

members.name: RemoveAnimation
members.signature: public void RemoveAnimation(StringName anim)
members.summary: Removes the [param anim] animation.

members.name: RemoveFrame
members.signature: public void RemoveFrame(StringName anim, int idx)
members.summary: Removes the [param anim] animation's frame [param idx].

members.name: RenameAnimation
members.signature: public void RenameAnimation(StringName anim, StringName newname)
members.summary: Changes the [param anim] animation's name to [param newname].

members.name: SetAnimationLoop
members.signature: public void SetAnimationLoop(StringName anim, bool loop)
members.summary: If [param loop] is [code]false[/code] equivalent to [code]set_animation_loop_mode(LOOP_NONE)[/code]. If [param loop] is [code]true[/code] equivalent to [code]set_animation_loop_mode(LOOP_LINEAR)[/code].

members.name: SetAnimationLoopMode
members.signature: public void SetAnimationLoopMode(StringName anim, int loopMode)
members.summary: Sets the [param loop_mode] for the [param anim] animation.

members.name: SetAnimationSpeed
members.signature: public void SetAnimationSpeed(StringName anim, float fps)
members.summary: Sets the speed for the [param anim] animation in frames per second.

members.name: SetFrame
members.signature: public void SetFrame(StringName anim, int idx, Texture2D texture, float duration)
members.summary: Sets the [param texture] and the [param duration] of the frame [param idx] in the [param anim] animation. [param duration] specifies the relative duration, see [method get_frame_duration] for details.

values.name: LOOP_LINEAR
values.summary: The animation restarts from the beginning when it reaches the end, or from the end if played in reverse, repeating continuously.

values.name: LOOP_NONE
values.summary: The animation plays once and stops when it reaches the end, or the start if played in reverse.

values.name: LOOP_PINGPONG
values.summary: The animation alternates direction each time it reaches the end or start, playing forward and then in reverse repeatedly. [b]Note:[/b] Both [AnimatedSprite2D] and [AnimatedSprite3D] play the first/last frame for its duration only once at each end of the animation loop (instead of twice, once per forward/backward animation direction).

constants.name: LOOP_NONE
constants.summary: The animation plays once and stops when it reaches the end, or the start if played in reverse.

constants.name: LOOP_LINEAR
constants.summary: The animation restarts from the beginning when it reaches the end, or from the end if played in reverse, repeating continuously.

constants.name: LOOP_PINGPONG
constants.summary: The animation alternates direction each time it reaches the end or start, playing forward and then in reverse repeatedly. [b]Note:[/b] Both [AnimatedSprite2D] and [AnimatedSprite3D] play the first/last frame for its duration only once at each end of the animation loop (instead of twice, once per forward/backward animation direction).
